    F

    FabricBootstrap - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Fabric-specific bootstrap helper for wiring MagicUtils services.
    FabricBootstrap.Builder - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Builder for wiring MagicUtils services on Fabric.
    FabricBootstrap.Result - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Result of bootstrap wiring.
    FabricBootstrap.RuntimeResult - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Runtime-aware bootstrap result.

    Fabric-specific platform hooks for the command engine.

    Creates a platform wrapper using op level 2.

    Creates a platform wrapper with a custom op level fallback.
